name: Ground Beef Keema
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in an iron skillet, draining off any excess grease.
2. Add the onion and all the seasonings to the beef.
3. Stir in the green peas and Parmesan cheese.
4. Simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Serve with rice or use the mixture as a filling for pita bread pockets to make a sandwich.
